Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features JP Marotte as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte
Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte
Day in the Life of a Coach - JP Marotte

HKFC 21 - Mike Goehr v. Barrett Thompson
HKFC 21 - Mike Goehr v. Barrett Thompson

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

Video.summary: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.
